name: TheSportsDB
description: Open sports database — schedules, results, lineups, team info, league data, player histories across every major sport (NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, EPL + every soccer league, F1, MMA, tennis, NCAA, AFL, CFL, rugby, cricket, esports). Complements The Odds API: that one gives you bookmaker prices, this one gives you the underlying game schedule + outcome. Use to confirm a Polymarket sports market is about to resolve, look up final scores, or build a lookahead calendar. Free dev tier with api_key='3' (rate-limited); paid Patreon tier ($3+/month) gets a personal key with no limits. Sign up at https://www.thesportsdb.com/api.php. Note: api_key is in the URL path, not headers — that's their convention.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Use '3' for the free dev tier (rate-limited, recent data only). Patreon-tier supporters get a personal key with no limits — register at https://www.thesportsdb.com/api.php.

tools.name: search_teams
tools.description: Find teams by name. Returns id (idTeam), full name (strTeam), short name, sport, league, country, manager, founded year, stadium, badge URL. Use to resolve a team mentioned in a Polymarket market to a stable id for further lookups.

tools.name: lookup_team
tools.description: Get full details for one team by id. Returns everything search_teams returns plus stadium description, social media handles, country, jersey colors.

tools.name: all_leagues
tools.description: Browse every league across every sport. Returns idLeague + strLeague + strSport + strCurrentSeason. Use to discover the league ids needed for next_events_league + events_round.

tools.name: next_events_league
tools.description: Next 15 upcoming events for a league. Returns idEvent, dateEvent, strEvent (home vs away), strLeague, strSeason, intRound. Use as the lookahead calendar for sports betting markets.

id.description: idLeague — e.g. 4328 for English Premier League, 4387 for NBA.

tools.name: next_events_team
tools.description: Next 15 upcoming events for a specific team. Useful for tracking a single team's schedule.

tools.name: last_events_team
tools.description: Last 15 completed events for a team — final scores + venue + season. Use to verify a Polymarket sports market should already be resolved and check the outcome.

tools.name: events_day
tools.description: All events on a specific date across a sport (or league). Useful for daily betting calendars + 'is today X major event day?' checks.

l.description: Optional strLeague (URL-encoded) — narrows to one league.

tools.name: lookup_event
tools.description: Full detail for one event — final score, attendance, weather, lineups (when available), commentary URL.

tools.name: events_round
tools.description: Every event in a specific round of a season. Useful for full-round bracket scans (playoffs, tournament rounds).

tools.name: league_table
tools.description: Current standings table for a league season. Returns rank, team, wins, losses, draws, points, goals for/against. Use to assess team strength when reasoning about future fixtures.
